name: Gideon - roles exchanged
description:
Meet Gideon, the guardsmen and create his biggest adventure yet!

In a change of the usual role we take as user and bot, gideon isn't ment to be played with.

I tried making him the main character while we as the user take the role of the bot! He will have an adventure while we supply him with ... well they aren't NPC's anymore if we're controlling them, now are they? So let's call them non-player-player-characters instead (NPPC's).

Gideon will not use your persona as a reference, if not specifically asked and instead it is up to you to come up with new friends and foes for him!

Just state at the start where Gideon is, what he's doing or is up to and let's go! The setting is balanced around a low fantasy, medievil world, but you can adjust that, if you want, just state it in your starting text.

PS: Gideon has a quit thinly made character and instead the work went all into the Scenario! So if you want to give him a quirk or define his character a bit more to your liking, just add that in the first message too :>

This is my fourth bot and my first where i try something that is a bit different ^^;

Also this one is requested by a friend, so thanks for that idea and opportunity!

And now have fun with lil Gidy!

Also i am still tinkering on him. If you have any suggestions, please let me know!
creator: Cali Kuroichi
